reviews.comment:
Muy limpio y agradable. Atención muy amable. Predio con mucho pasto y juegos para los niños.  La verdad muy lindo!!!

(Translated by Google)
Very clean and pleasant. Very friendly service. Lots of grass and a playground for children. Truly lovely!

reviews.comment:
Demasiado, las sillas por demás de incomodas y cuando fui hacia mucho calor. Poca variedad de productos. Las medialunas muy feas.

(Translated by Google)
Too bad. The chairs were extremely uncomfortable, and it was very hot when I went. There was little variety. The croissants were very ugly.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, calidad y precios. El ACA cuenta con todos los servicios (gomería por ejemplo) un lugar para parar en la autopista Buenos Aires - Rosario, sobre todos cuando vas de Buenos Aires a Rosario ya que te queda en la mano. Excelentes promos para desayunos, comidas, etc. Muy buen precio

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, quality, and prices. The ACA has all the services you need (tire repair, for example) and is a great place to stop on the Buenos Aires-Rosario highway, especially when traveling from Buenos Aires to Rosario, as it's conveniently located. They have excellent deals on breakfast, meals, and more. Very good prices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2X3ItXy1RRRAB
